prompts: Write Phase 1 roadmap spec covering MCP server completion and deck stability
output: Created .claude/specs/PHASE_1_ROADMAP.md — comprehensive spec covering: MCP server gap analysis + completion tasks, deck type bug inventory, DeckDetailPage fix, SQLite deck API persistence, Docker volume setup, TanStack Query frontend migration, localStorage migration, Docker orchestration audit, and full deck QA checklist

prompts: Fix Google auth sign-in flow showing React Router error page
Audit and fix remaining v0 production release gaps
output: Fixed: added /auth/ proxy in apps/web/src/server/server.ts so auth routes (GET /auth/google, GET /auth/callback, GET /auth/me, POST /auth/logout) are proxied to rest-api instead of being rendered as React routes. Updated apps/web/src/server/lib/routes.ts with missing WEB_ROUTES and WEB_ROUTE_PATTERNS entries for /dashboard, /sign-in, /cards/:id, /decks/browse. Dev note: GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI must be http://localhost:3000/auth/callback for local dev (not 3001).

prompts: Implement Tier 3 competitive parity features: T3-A archetype tier list, T3-B rotation calendar, T3-C CP tracker
output: T3-A: migration 011 (tier column on meta_decks), tier badge in MetaDeckCard (S/A/B/C/D with spec colors), tier filter pills on MetaDeckBrowserPage, seed data tiers assigned. T3-B: rotation-data.ts ROTATION_HISTORY constant, RotationPage at /rotation, CalendarDays Navbar link. T3-C: migration 012 (cp_entries), cp.ts handler (GET/POST/DELETE /api/v1/cp, authRequired), CpTrackerPage at /cp with progress bar and Day2/Worlds thresholds, Trophy Navbar link (auth-only). 133/133 tests pass, 13/13 check-types clean.

prompts: Implement johto deck CLI tool — all 5 phases (deck file format, MCP extensions, CLI app, agent prompt, browser mode)
output: Phase 1: example.toml — 60-card Mega Gardevoir ex deck, HIJ marks, all validation rules pass. Phase 2: MCP server — regulation_mark on PokemonCard (camelCase serde), domains/deck.rs, tools/load_deck.rs + validate_deck.rs, registered in main.rs; clippy clean. Phase 3: apps/deck-cli package — full Bun CLI with cac, McpClient, deck loader/writer, agent tools+loop, entry point. Phase 4: agent/prompt.ts — STATIC_PROMPT with all rulebook mechanics, renderDeck/renderCard, buildSystemPrompt. Phase 5: browser module — Bun.serve HTTP server, three-panel HTML page, TOML export, Chrome Prompt API. All verifications: clippy -D warnings clean, bun typecheck clean, dry-run PASS, validate_deck valid:true.
